zh.lifeSummary: 當Duc Pierre De Bourbon I於大約1311年4月出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特時，他的父親Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame32歲，母親Marie d'Avesnes32歲。他於1336年2月10日與Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年9月19日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯享年45歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duc Pierre De Bourbon I于大约1311年4月出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特时，他的父亲Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame32岁，母亲Marie d'Avesnes32岁。他于1336年2月10日与Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1356年9月19日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯享年45岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Duc Pierre De Bourbon I was born about April 1311, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, was 32 and his mother, Marie d'Avesnes, was 32. He married Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon on 10 February 1336. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 19 September 1356, in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 45, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duc Pierre De Bourbon I est né environ avril 1311, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Marie d'Avesnes, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon le 10 février 1336. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 19 septembre 1356, à Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duc Pierre De Bourbon I um April 1311 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame 32 und seine Mutter Marie d'Avesnes 32. Er hat am 10. Februar 1336 Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 19. September 1356 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duc Pierre De Bourbon I è nato il circa aprile 1311 nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Marie d'Avesnes, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon il 10 febbraio 1336. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 19 settembre 1356, nel Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Duc Pierre De Bourbon Iが約1311年4月にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトで生まれた時，父Louis De Bourbon I,The Lameは32歳，母Marie d'Avesnesは32歳であった。1336年2月10日にIsabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年9月19日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンポイティエルズで45歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duc Pierre De Bourbon I(이)가 대략 1311년 4월 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie d'Avesnes(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1336년 2월 10일 Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 9월 19일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 포이티어스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.ABT APR 1311–19 September 1356: aproximadamente abril de 1311–19 de setembro de 1356
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duc Pierre De Bourbon I nasceu aproximadamente abril de 1311, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Marie d'Avesnes, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon em 10 de fevereiro de 1336. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1356, em Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duc Pierre De Bourbon I родился около апрель 1311 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Marie d'Avesnes, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon 10 февраля 1336 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 19 сентября 1356 г. в местности поитиирс, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.ABT APR 1311–19 September 1356: aproximadamente abril de 1311–19 de septiembre de 1356
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duc Pierre De Bourbon I nació aproximadamente abril de 1311, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Louis De Bourbon I,The Lame, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Marie d'Avesnes, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon el 10 de febrero de 1336. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1356, en Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
